emails.subject: Re: deal 553645
emails.body: Re: deal 553645 I've spoken with Rhonda about this, and I'll be letting the traders know to be prepared for the change. This deal has been changed to Allegheny. Thanks, Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 03/20/2001 11:44 AM

emails.subject: deal 553645
emails.body: Kate I spoke with Phil about this deal this morning and I just called but he away at lunch. Per our Rhonda, can you tell him that deal 553645 should be changed Allegheny Energy Supply and that we should no longer do any deals under Merrill Lynch. Also, can you let the schedulers know about the name change of this deal. Thanks!
